## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call between ReSourcePro and GrowthX to explore potential AI-driven content and growth solutions for ReSourcePro's compliance business unit.](https://fathom.video/share/g2NmvSsxXb5yP8VjNqxvvCPw2z-75C6r?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [ReSourcePro is considering GrowthX for a pilot project to modernize and integrate their recently acquired compliance business](https://fathom.video/share/g2NmvSsxXb5yP8VjNqxvvCPw2z-75C6r?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [GrowthX offers an AI-powered content creation and distribution platform with human editors and strategists involved throughout the process](https://fathom.video/share/g2NmvSsxXb5yP8VjNqxvvCPw2z-75C6r?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)
  - [The engagement would start with an 8-week, $20K strategy sprint to develop artifacts, roadmaps, and content strategies before any longer-term commitment](https://fathom.video/share/g2NmvSsxXb5yP8VjNqxvvCPw2z-75C6r?tab=summary&timestamp=94.0)
  - [ReSourcePro is interested but needs to consider budget constraints and evaluate the fit for their compliance-focused, highly regulated content needs](https://fathom.video/share/g2NmvSsxXb5yP8VjNqxvvCPw2z-75C6r?tab=summary&timestamp=750.0)

## Topics

### ReSourcePro's Compliance Business Context

  - [Recently acquired compliance business, operating as a separate unit within ReSourcePro (11,000 person company)](https://fathom.video/share/g2NmvSsxXb5yP8VjNqxvvCPw2z-75C6r?tab=summary&timestamp=449.0)
  - [Shorter sales cycles compared to other insurance tech offerings (similar to website security purchases)](https://fathom.video/share/g2NmvSsxXb5yP8VjNqxvvCPw2z-75C6r?tab=summary&timestamp=488.0)
  - [Highly specialized, expert-driven field with constant regulatory changes](https://fathom.video/share/g2NmvSsxXb5yP8VjNqxvvCPw2z-75C6r?tab=summary&timestamp=509.0)
  - [Currently maintaining separate website, gradually integrating into main ReSourcePro site](https://fathom.video/share/g2NmvSsxXb5yP8VjNqxvvCPw2z-75C6r?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Opportunity to modernize marketing approach in a traditionally paper-based industry](https://fathom.video/share/g2NmvSsxXb5yP8VjNqxvvCPw2z-75C6r?tab=summary&timestamp=778.0)

### GrowthX's AI-Powered Content Platform

  - [Utilizes a combination of AI workflows and human editors/strategists](https://fathom.video/share/g2NmvSsxXb5yP8VjNqxvvCPw2z-75C6r?tab=summary&timestamp=1302.0)
  - [8-week strategy sprint to develop deep understanding of client's business and content needs](https://fathom.video/share/g2NmvSsxXb5yP8VjNqxvvCPw2z-75C6r?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Creates AI-ready artifacts that power automated content creation processes](https://fathom.video/share/g2NmvSsxXb5yP8VjNqxvvCPw2z-75C6r?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Flexible workflow adaptations for industries requiring legal/compliance reviews](https://fathom.video/share/g2NmvSsxXb5yP8VjNqxvvCPw2z-75C6r?tab=summary&timestamp=1052.0)
  - [Publishes over 10 million words monthly across various industries and company sizes](https://fathom.video/share/g2NmvSsxXb5yP8VjNqxvvCPw2z-75C6r?tab=summary&timestamp=1143.0)

### Engagement Structure and Pricing

  - [Initial 8-week strategy sprint: $20K flat fee](https://fathom.video/share/g2NmvSsxXb5yP8VjNqxvvCPw2z-75C6r?tab=summary&timestamp=1840.0)
  - [No obligation to continue after sprint phase](https://fathom.video/share/g2NmvSsxXb5yP8VjNqxvvCPw2z-75C6r?tab=summary&timestamp=1836.0)
  - [Typical ongoing engagements start at $12K/month for execution](https://fathom.video/share/g2NmvSsxXb5yP8VjNqxvvCPw2z-75C6r?tab=summary&timestamp=1906.0)
  - [Customizable based on content volume and specific client needs identified in sprint](https://fathom.video/share/g2NmvSsxXb5yP8VjNqxvvCPw2z-75C6r?tab=summary&timestamp=1940.0)

### Content Distribution and Beyond

  - [Initial focus on editorial content to establish foundation](https://fathom.video/share/g2NmvSsxXb5yP8VjNqxvvCPw2z-75C6r?tab=summary&timestamp=2008.0)
  - [Potential for programmatic, template-based content for scale (e.g., city-level or industry-specific pages)](https://fathom.video/share/g2NmvSsxXb5yP8VjNqxvvCPw2z-75C6r?tab=summary&timestamp=2043.0)
  - [Additional distribution channels like newsletters, lead magnets, and social posts can be explored after initial phase](https://fathom.video/share/g2NmvSsxXb5yP8VjNqxvvCPw2z-75C6r?tab=summary&timestamp=2066.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to send follow-up email with engagement details and standard SOW](https://fathom.video/share/g2NmvSsxXb5yP8VjNqxvvCPw2z-75C6r?tab=summary&timestamp=2110.0)
  - [GrowthX to record a brief overview video explaining the engagement structure](https://fathom.video/share/g2NmvSsxXb5yP8VjNqxvvCPw2z-75C6r?tab=summary&timestamp=2295.0)
  - [Chris Hanson to collect and relay any questions or feedback from the ReSourcePro team](https://fathom.video/share/g2NmvSsxXb5yP8VjNqxvvCPw2z-75C6r?tab=summary&timestamp=2141.0)
  - [Potential follow-up call next week to discuss engagement details live](https://fathom.video/share/g2NmvSsxXb5yP8VjNqxvvCPw2z-75C6r?tab=summary&timestamp=2127.0)
  - [ReSourcePro to consider budget constraints and evaluate fit for their compliance content needs](https://fathom.video/share/g2NmvSsxXb5yP8VjNqxvvCPw2z-75C6r?tab=summary&timestamp=1779.0)
